post.description: Create a new admin user linked to an existing organization.
Create a new candidate user with free plan.
Authenticate with email/password and receive JWT access + refresh tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.
Revoke a refresh token. Idempotent — succeeds even if token already revoked.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

get.description: Get the authenticated user's full profile. Requires valid access token.

post.description:
Start a new audio ingestion session bound to *exchange_id*.

Returns 201 on success, 409 if a session already exists.
Pause, resume, or stop an active audio session.

get.description: Return the current status of an audio session.
Database health check with connection pool status

email.title: Email
email.description: Valid email address, must be unique across all users

organization_id.title: Organization Id
organization_id.description: ID of the organization to join

admin_role.title: Admin Role
admin_role.description: Admin role assignment. Cannot be 'superadmin' via registration.

AdminRegistrationRequest.title: AdminRegistrationRequest
AdminRegistrationRequest.description:
Request schema for admin user registration.

Constraints:
- Cannot self-assign 'superadmin' role (requires existing superadmin approval)
- organization_id must reference an existing, active organization
- Email must be unique across all users

AudioSessionControlRequest.title: AudioSessionControlRequest
AudioSessionControlRequest.description: POST body for session control (pause / resume / stop).

AudioSessionResponse.title: AudioSessionResponse
AudioSessionResponse.description: Response after starting / controlling a session.

silence_threshold_ms.title: Silence Threshold Ms
silence_threshold_ms.description: Custom silence threshold in ms (default from config)

AudioSessionStartRequest.title: AudioSessionStartRequest
AudioSessionStartRequest.description: POST body to start an audio session.

email.title: Email
email.description: Valid email address, must be unique across all users

CandidateRegistrationRequest.title: CandidateRegistrationRequest
CandidateRegistrationRequest.description:
Request schema for candidate user registration.

Candidates are NOT associated with any organization.

CodingProblemResponse.title: CodingProblemResponse
CodingProblemResponse.description: Single coding problem in response payload.

CurrentUserResponse.title: CurrentUserResponse
CurrentUserResponse.description:
Response for /me endpoint — full user profile with status fields.

Extends UserProfileResponse with status and timestamp fields.

DimensionRequest.title: DimensionRequest
DimensionRequest.description: A single rubric dimension in request payload.

DimensionResponse.title: DimensionResponse
DimensionResponse.description: A single rubric dimension in response payload.

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope (matches shared error serialisation).

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest
LoginRequest.description:
Request schema for user authentication.

Email comparison is case-insensitive (handled by domain layer).

LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse
LoginResponse.description:
Response returned after successful login.

Contains JWT access token, opaque refresh token, and user profile.

LogoutRequest.title: LogoutRequest
LogoutRequest.description:
Request schema for user logout (token revocation).

Idempotent — succeeds even if the token is already revoked.

override_fields.title: Override Fields
override_fields.description: Fields to override on base content

OverrideResponse.title: OverrideResponse
OverrideResponse.description: Single override record in response payload.

RefreshTokenRequest.title: RefreshTokenRequest
RefreshTokenRequest.description:
Request schema for access token refresh.

The refresh_token is the opaque token string (not the hash).
Domain layer hashes it for lookup.

RegistrationResponse.title: RegistrationResponse
RegistrationResponse.description: Response returned after successful user registration.

refresh_token.title: Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: New refresh token (if rotation enabled, same otherwise)

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: Seconds until new access token expires

TokenRefreshResponse.title: TokenRefreshResponse
TokenRefreshResponse.description:
Response returned after successful token refresh.

If refresh token rotation is enabled, a new refresh_token is issued.

UserProfileResponse.title: UserProfileResponse
UserProfileResponse.description:
User profile embedded in auth responses.

Fields are conditionally populated based on user_type:
- admin: admin_id, organization_id, admin_role are set
- candidate: candidate_id, full_name are set

WindowMappingRequest.title: WindowMappingRequest
WindowMappingRequest.description: A single window-role-template mapping in request payload.
